External/account/manual evidence remains tracked in docs/stories/DEFERRED_EXTERNAL_BLOCKERS.md: custom domain decision, Neon PR lifecycle, Auth0 passwordless/session evidence, Sentry/Better Stack, device PWA install, cron secret invocation, and accepted deviations.

Closed 2026-06-30 as implemented and verified. All Sprint 1 stories have done events; inherited Sprint 0 external deferrals remain active. Latest production deployment and Sprint 1 UI closure gate passed.
Member loan origination persists borrower, config version, declining-balance schedule, first-period admin fee, and audit row.
Non-member origination requires active guarantor, writes non_member_borrower and loan_guarantor rows, and filters guarantor picker by remaining capacity.
Origination optionally stamps referrer member and LoanReferral with commission amount/currency for later payoff credit.
Repayment action computes interest-first split against date-bounded interest and outstanding principal, persists Repayment, updates schedule paid-to-date, and shows split success copy.
Loan detail renders summary, schedule, payments, history, and actions sections with party names, fees, paid-to-date, repayment split, accruals, and reversal affordance markers.
Accrue-interest cron plans idempotent loan/day interest accruals, mora fees, A6 alerts, and run summaries.
Final repayment transitions loan to pagado and credits exactly one referral_commission_credit withdrawal with guarded LoanReferral accrual update, audit, and low-severity alert.
Contribution payment_source persists with audit, cash source does not require slip, bank/petty cash do require slip, and monthly close shows separate bank and petty-cash reconciliation inputs.
Partial contributions persist append-only, compliance derivation and MV ordering return parcial for 0 < sum < expected, and status pill maps parcial to neutral.
Cron run history page lists cron_run rows and provides manual replay action guarded by platform operator session and CRON_SECRET bearer invocation.
